name: Blue
short_description: "Blue" is a hardcore platformer game with pixel art style. Players need to complete collection objectives in different levels while avoiding various monsters and obstacles.
detailed_description:
Blue is a hardcore platformer game with pixel art style. Players need to complete collection objectives in different levels while avoiding various monsters and obstacles.

Each level brings new challenges, making it difficult for players to adapt. Blue will test your skills, reaction speed, and adaptability.

Game features:
  • 30 levels
  • Simple controls
  • Challenging gameplay
  • Built-in challenge timer
  • Charming pixel art
  • 8-bit retro music and sound effects
